pages.textParity: acceptable — full legal text present (5042 chars)

issues.criterion: Images render correctly — no broken images in preview
issues.details: Homepage preview contains 3 broken elements in the cards and columns blocks. The da.live HTML has correct absolute juvederm.nl CDN URLs (confirmed 200), but the AEM EDS preview pipeline fails to process them and renders 'about:error' as the image src. Affected alts: 'Vrouwelijke behandeling met JUVÉDERM®', 'Mannelijke behandeling met JUVÉDERM®', 'Waarschuwing icoon'. Effective image ratio for homepage: 0/11 = 0% (threshold: 50%).
issues.remediation: Images in EDS da.live content must be hosted in da.live's own media store (uploaded via da.live API, not external absolute URLs). External URLs from juvederm.nl CDN cannot be reliably processed by the EDS image optimization pipeline. Either: (1) download images and re-upload to da.live as /media/* assets, or (2) use the da.live media upload API to store images internally before referencing them in HTML.

issues.criterion: Content fidelity — image count ratio >= 50% of source
issues.details: FAQ page (https://main--jv-test-5--jmffraiz.aem.page/nl/qa) has 1 image in preview vs 12 images in the source page. Image ratio = 8.3%, well below the 50% threshold. The 11 missing images are topic/category section images (e.g. juvederm-voluma-image03, incidental-carmen, key-visual-sofie etc.) that appear alongside the FAQ accordion topics. The topic-menu block was implemented as a text-only navigation list (links only, no images).
issues.remediation: FAQ category/topic images must be included in the topic-menu block or as standalone images in each FAQ section. Review the source FAQ page and add the category images to the da.live document (as properly hosted da.live media assets). Re-upload and re-trigger preview.

issues.criterion: Metadata/Open Graph image must not reference broken paths
issues.details: Homepage preview's <meta property="og:image"> still references the broken path "/media/homepage/hero-bg.jpg" (which returns 404). The og:image:secure_url is set to "about:error". This broken OG image path was one of the previously identified fixes, but the Metadata block in da.live was not updated with the correct absolute CDN URL for the OG image.
issues.remediation: Update the Metadata block in the da.live homepage document (index): change the 'og:image' or 'image' property from '/media/homepage/hero-bg.jpg' to the correct absolute CDN URL (e.g. https://www.juvederm.nl/content/dam/juvederm-ous/common/allergan_header_04_16by9_001.png). Then re-upload and preview.

issues.details: The disclaimer source page contains a 'Kijk uit' (warning) section with an icon image (icon-kijk-uit-melding-white.png). This section is absent from the da.live disclaimer document. The image ratio for disclaimer is 0/1 = 0%. While the main legal text is fully present, this warning section is part of the main content area (not nav/footer).
issues.remediation: Add the 'Kijk uit' warning section to the da.live disclaimer document with the proper warning icon image and text. Upload the image to da.live media store and reference it correctly.

passingChecks: All 4 da.live source API endpoints return HTTP 200
metadata.js returns HTTP 200 (680 bytes) — previously 404, now fixed
No broken /media/ relative paths in da.live image src attributes
FAQ hero image: absolute CDN URL confirmed 200 (was previously broken)
Lips page: 11 images all with absolute juvederm.nl CDN URLs, all return 200
Homepage hero video block renders correctly (hero video class present)
FAQ: 5 accordion tables present with question/answer structure
Lips: hero, carousel, tabs, accordion blocks all decorate correctly
Disclaimer: h1 heading and full legal text present
summary: FAIL — 2 high-severity issues block acceptance: (1) Homepage 3 content images render as about:error (0% image ratio) because external absolute CDN URLs are not supported by EDS image pipeline; (2) FAQ has 8.3% image ratio (11 topic/category images missing from da.live document). Medium issue: homepage og:image metadata still references broken /media/homepage/hero-bg.jpg path. metadata.js 404 is confirmed fixed.
